meaning: v.弄皱,压皱,变皱,崩溃,垮台
examples: Take care not to crumple your dress by packing it carelessly.
Crumple a few sheets into balls and place them in with piles of kindling.
Crumple a sheet of cooking paper, flatten it, and then place it over the pan.
Many Brazilian car bodies also don't contain crumple zones, areas that absorb energy during wrecks.
Its main crash-test building yanks a car across the floor while high-speed cameras record every crumple.
